query: i need to pitch a dog-walking startup tomorrow. can you mock up 4 polished iphone screens for the customer app: onboarding, nearby walkers map, booking, and live walk status? i only need visuals i can show in a browser, not production code.

Design an iOS habit tracker for night routines. Give me a native-feeling mobile UI with a calm visual direction and screens for onboarding, today's checklist, streaks, and reminder settings. This is for concept validation, not app implementation.

my PM dropped a messy feature brief in docs/meal-planner-notes.md. turn it into a believable mobile app flow for a meal planning app with 5 screens and consistent ios patterns. wireframe quality is too rough; make it feel like a real product.

Can you create a prototype-style mockup for an iPhone meditation app for college students? I want a home screen, session player, progress screen, and profile. Static screens are fine as long as they look polished.

I have an idea for a campus marketplace app and need the core flow visualized before engineering starts. Please design the browse feed, listing detail, sell item form, inbox, and account screens in a native iOS style.
make me a mobile UI concept for a barber booking app. i want an elegant dark theme, strong hierarchy, and clear booking actions. give me a few connected iphone screens i can review locally.

Could you mock up two alternative iOS checkout flows for a grocery delivery app? I want to compare a compact one-page checkout versus a more guided multi-step flow. Keep this at the design/prototype level only.

Need some App Store style preview screens for a travel journaling app concept. Please design the underlying mobile screens first so they feel cohesive: trip timeline, map, journal entry, and memories gallery.

I want to explore what a premium finance tracking app could look like on iPhone. Can you build a visual mockup with 3 to 5 screens, realistic copy, and modern iOS components so I can use it in a design review?

Take the rough app idea below and turn it into a coherent mobile flow with polished screens: a pet medication reminder app for busy families. I need something more refined than low-fi wireframes, but still just static UI.
Build the actual SwiftUI screens for a habit tracker app and wire them up with navigation and state management. I need production-ready iOS code, not mockups.
I already designed these screens in Figma. Can you convert the file into React Native components and set up the navigation structure for me?
Design a responsive marketing website for a travel startup with a hero section, pricing, FAQ, and email capture. It should look great on desktop and mobile browsers.
Can you help me debug why the spacing in my SwiftUI onboarding screen collapses on iPhone SE? The screenshot is in ~/Downloads/onboarding-bug.png and I need the code fixed.
I need a brand identity package for a new wellness app: logo concepts, color palette, typography, and social profile assets. No app screens yet.
Make an Android implementation plan for our shopping app redesign. I need Jetpack Compose component recommendations, architecture notes, and engineering estimates.
Can you generate a Prisma schema and API endpoints for a barber booking app with users, appointments, services, and availability windows?
Review this existing mobile screenshot and tell me what's wrong with the UX. I want critique and recommendations, not a new mockup.
Please turn this product brief into a PRD for a medication reminder app, including goals, personas, user stories, metrics, and launch risks.
I need a clickable prototype in React Native for investor demos. It should run on a phone and include real navigation, basic state, and a backend stub.
